title: secale strictum subsp. ciliatoglume
intro: Secale strictum subsp. ciliatoglume, also known as ciliate glume rye, is a subspecies of the rye grass, Secale strictum. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of ciliate glume rye include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ciliate glume rye is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
